name: Ghost
short_description: This is a farm themed platform jumping game with simple gameplay but quite cute and interesting.
detailed_description:
This is a farm themed platform jumping game with simple gameplay but quite cute and interesting.
Players help the calf keep jumping in the game, jumping over one cloud after another, keeping the calf on top of the clouds and not falling. As the game progresses, the difficulty will also increase. Can you help the calf reach the height they want to reach? I hope everyone can have a pleasant gaming time.
